jobDescription: This is Adyen Speed is the foundation of our company. We think fast. We work fast. We launch fast. Our merchants’ demands shape our development path, and we never stop until the job is done. We’re creating our own path, with a global team driving sustainable growth. We don’t do hierarchy, egos or boundaries. “ Not possible” is not in our vocabulary — “freedom” is. This is who we are: honest, direct and always bringing an element of fun into our work. If you’re ready to join the power of fast, keep reading. Office Manager We are looking for a highly organized, energetic and hands-on office manager for our Headquarters in Amsterdam. What you’ll do Manage all office facilities, building maintenance and coordinate logistics to ensure the office runs smoothly with a team of two other office managers. You will be the go-to person for any office related queries. Manage and negotiate vendor contracts and maintain contact with our suppliers, e.g. catering, cleaning, security and office supplies to ensure service levels are achieved daily. Organize internal events, office meetings and other in-house recruitment events. Negotiate best deals for venues, catering, AV etc. Be the point of contact for our business travel management tool, foresee and manage improvements on the platform. Be a member of our Health & Safety ( BHV) team. Who you are You are a passionate self-starter with the ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment.  You are an organizational genius and have a strong personality You are a highly motivated team player where winning is more important than ego You have a positive attitude, flexible and able to hustle to get things done Your qualifications Education level minimum HBO degree in Facility Management Minimum of 3 - 5 year experience working in an office/ facility manager role, preferably in a comparable and international environment Fluent in Dutch and English (spoken and written) Who we are Adyen is the payments platform of choice for many of the world’s leading companies, providing a modern end-to-end infrastructure connecting directly to Visa, Mastercard, and consumers' globally preferred payment methods. Adyen delivers frictionless payments across online, mobile, and in-store channels. With offices across the world, Adyen serves customers including Facebook, Uber, Spotify, Casper, Bonobos and L' Oreal.
